items.headline: Game Recap: Thunder 108, Lakers 90
items.description: The Oklahoma City Thunder defeated the Los Angeles Lakers, 108-90, in Game 1 to lead the series 1-0.

items.headline: The Journey of Shai Gilgeous-Alexander
items.description: Reigning MVP Shai Gilgeous-Alexander of the OKC Thunder shares the story of his basketball journey, narrated by NBCs Maria Taylor.

items.headline: LeBron James drops 27 points in Game 1 vs. OKC
items.description: LeBron James drops 27 points along with six assists in Game 1 vs. the Thunder.

items.headline: Chet Holmgren records 24 points, 12 rebounds in Game 1
items.description: Chet Holmgren records 24 points along with 12 rebounds in a Game 1 victory for the Thunder.
